fix: even wheel spacing via monospace code block

Replace emoji+number strip with a 3-row code block:
- numbers right-aligned to 3 chars (col 14 = units digit)
- ▲ pointer row at col 14
- R/B/G colour row aligned to col 14

Guarantees even spacing regardless of number width or emoji rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix lender lookup in LOA/cover letter generation and update Fair Finance email

The lender details lookup was treating the all_lenders_details.json array as
an object, so lender address/email was never populated in generated documents.
Fixed to use Array.find() instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

add commit-all command and expand README with Commands section

Adds a new Commands/ directory with commit-all.md, a custom Claude Code
slash command that interactively scans all git repos, shows diffs, and
commits/pushes each one on confirmation. Updates README to document hooks,
skills, and commands clearly in one place.

commit.message:
fix: Google Sheets audit — OZON onboarding, debounce, retry, comment preservation

Phase 1 fixes from deep audit of Google Sheets integration:
- OZON stores now get Drive folder + client directory row (same as WB)
- Added Client Directory cron (7:30 MSK daily, after Product Rules at 6:00)
- Debounced triggerAsyncSync (5s coalesce + running/pending state)
- Comment preservation: reads column U before clear, restores after write
- Retry wrapper (3 attempts, exponential backoff) for all Google API calls
- Updated CRON_JOBS.md with new section 7 and debounce/retry docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add skipReason and skipDetail attributes to Suggestion (#1372)

Summary
Adds skipReason (enum) and skipDetail (string, max 500 chars) as
optional attributes on the Suggestion model, enabling structured
tracking of why users skip
  suggestions.

- SKIP_REASONS enum: ALREADY_IMPLEMENTED, INACCURATE_OR_INCOMPLETE,
TOO_RISKY, NO_REASON, OTHER
  - UPPER_CASE values matching existing STATUSES/TYPES convention
- skipReason → skip_reason and skipDetail → skip_detail mapped
automatically via camelToSnake
  - No redundant postgrestField annotations
- Validation: skipDetail capped at 500 characters using isString()
utility

  Related Issues

  - SITES-38900

  Related PRs

- DB migration: https://github.com/adobe/mysticat-data-service/pull/108
- API controller + OpenAPI:
https://github.com/adobe/spacecat-api-service/pull/1873
- Frontend:
https://github.com/OneAdobe/experience-success-studio-ui/pull/1598 (WIP)

  Test plan

  - All 5 enum values asserted with length check
  - Getter/setter tests for skipReason and skipDetail
  - Null handling for both fields
  - 1523 unit tests passing
  - Local e2e verified against PostgreSQL

Thanks for contributing!

---------

Co-authored-by: Kanishka <kanishka@adobe.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix cert-manager: enable Gateway API via config.enableGatewayAPI, bump to v1.19.4

Replace featureGates string with config.enableGatewayAPI: true which is the
correct approach for cert-manager v1.15+. This activates the gateway-shim
controller so cert-manager automatically provisions certificates from Gateway
resources annotated with cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer.

🐝 Migrate legacy OWID datasets (#5748)

* 🐝 Migrate legacy OWID datasets

* 🐝🤖 Migrate 29 legacy OWID datasets

All 29 migrated successfully with zero failures:
- Seafood impacts Gephart (5373→7454), Freshwater use IGB (1020→7455)
- Plastic bag substitute Danish EPA (2878→7456), Air pollutants DEFRA (2451→7457)
- Agricultural TFP USDA (5491→7458), UK wages BoE (396→7459)
- Deforestation trade Pendrill (5225→7460), Women's earnings BLS (1871→7461)
- Retirement age OECD (5229→7462), Haber-Bosch FAO (979→7463)
- Air pollution Fouquet (516→7464), Plastic waste Jambeck (2840→7465)
- Productivity GDP (2553→7466), Food miles Poore (4879→7467)
- Whale populations Pershing (4194→7468), Coal UK BEIS (951→7469)
- Americans alone IPUMS (2891→7470), Cigarette sales (2465→7471)
- Emissions intensity Linus (2672→7472), Genuine saving Blum (1031→7473)
- Books Buringh (5350→7474), Historical poverty (5232→7475)
- Human rights Fariss (241→7476), CV caloric intake (649→7477)
- Death rate ONS (1934→7478), Female labor OWID (656→7479)
- Tourism UNWTO (437→7480), Violent deaths (4881→7481)
- GHG food life-cycle Crippa (5274→7482)

Also fixed ruamel block key syntax in dag/migrated.yml and
added best_map_flow_style to prevent future occurrences.

commit.message:
refactor: dedupe internals, harden skill sync, and remove dead code (#47)

* refactor: deduplicate helpers, extract shared types, split large files

- Extract JSON path helpers (PathValue, FirstPathString, FirstPathNumber,
  NumberFromAny, etc.) into shared/jsonpath.go, replacing 3 identical
  copies across claude_code, codex, and opencode providers
- Extract HookUsage struct and HasHookUsage into shared/hook_usage.go,
  replacing identical types in claude_code and codex
- Replace hand-rolled map cloning with maps.Clone (Go stdlib)
- Consolidate float64Ptr/floatPtr into core.Float64Ptr across copilot,
  claude_code, and telemetry packages
- Replace firstNonEmptyNonBlank with core.FirstNonEmpty in telemetry
- Export core.FirstNonEmpty, replacing 4 private copies across providers
- Add DashboardWidget.IsZero() method, removing leaked free function
- Extract modifyConfig() helper, replacing 7 identical config save patterns
- Extract readModelCache from daemon Server for proper encapsulation
- Extract shared.ProbeRateLimits for deepseek and xai providers
- Decompose TUI Model into sub-structs (filterState, daemonState,
  settingsState) to reduce god object
- Split analytics.go (3193 lines) into analytics_data.go (types/data)
  and analytics.go (rendering)
- Simplify newUUID() to use stack-allocated array and fmt formatting

37 files changed, -1150 net lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Quote skill frontmatter descriptions and validate sync output

* Remove unreachable legacy code paths

* Apply go mod and gofmt fixes

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Add assets/logos/padre.svg — official Padre (Terminal) infinity logo

- Padre button now shows the real Padre green logo

DexScreener token search fix:
- Fixed Scanner.pairToToken → Scanner.formatToken (correct function name)
- Empty scanner grid now shows "Search DexScreener →" button when query

- Better empty state copy explaining how to use Find/Enter to add tokens

commit.message:
Set display heading line-heights in Tailwind theme tokens

Add --text-{size}--line-height companions in @theme so line-heights
are bundled with font-size utilities and apply everywhere automatically:
  text-3xl/4xl (34px): 1.1
  text-5xl (48px):     1.0
  text-6xl/7xl (68px): 0.95
  text-8xl (96px):     0.95
  text-9xl (136px):    0.9

Define --text-9xl: 8.5rem as canonical step +6.
Update about-us h1 from text-[136px] to text-9xl.

The /api/v1/drugs/identify endpoint was crashing because Playwright
is not installed in the Docker container. Removed web crawl fallback
entirely — drug identification now searches only from the database.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: virtualise joint list with FlatList to support up to 500 joints

ScrollView renders all joints at once — at 500 joints this causes
significant lag. FlatList only renders visible items (initialNumToRender
20, maxToRenderPerBatch 20) so the screen stays smooth regardless of
run size. Also raised Supabase joints query limit to 500.

fix: check PHARs exist before requiring phive

Move the "all already installed" early-exit check before the phive
availability check. If all PHARs and Rector are already present,
phive is not needed and the script exits cleanly.

This fixes environments where PHARs are manually installed (e.g.
downloaded from GitHub releases) but phive is not available.

imgui_port_enable_fps_counter_console() functions.

Uses function pointers so the FPS code is eliminated at link time
if the application doesn't call these functions.

- Console: prints FPS via ESP_LOGI once per second
- Enable both counters in test_apps/qemu_test

Closes #2

feat: add /roulette command

Multi-player European roulette (single zero). Players pick their bet
side then the host spins. Animated 7-number wheel strip scrolls fast
then decelerates over 15 frames using the authentic wheel order.

Bets: Red/Black (1:1), Odd/Even (1:1), 1-18/19-36 (1:1),
1st/2nd/3rd dozen (2:1), straight number via modal (35:1).
Player/Banker bets placed before spin; switching side is free.

Add join/leave room commands and start/stop convenience commands

Room state now lives in daemon memory. `join [name]` sets the current room,
`leave` tears down all shares and clears it. Share commands auto-join a
random room if not already in one. `start`/`stop` delegate to systemctl.
Removes --room flag from share commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: stop lock-conflict restart loop emitting RunnerExitCode: 1

When another runner instance holds runner.lock, the CLI now exits with
code 75 (EX_TEMPFAIL) in daemon mode instead of throwing an unhandled
error. The run-task.ps1 wrapper breaks its while-loop on exit code 75,
preventing the tight restart churn that previously logged RunnerExitCode: 1
every ~5 seconds.

- src/cli.ts: handle "Runner already active" in all modes; use
  process.exit(75) for daemon mode so the wrapper can distinguish a
  lock conflict from a legitimate crash.
- scripts/run-task.ps1: break the restart loop on exit code 75 and
  log a clear diagnostic message.
- tests/unit/lock.test.ts: add regression tests covering live-PID
  conflict (throws "Runner already active") and stale-lock takeover.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Refactor 929 patterns with topic-specific phrase regexes and domain keywords

Transform 824 top500 concept patterns (440 AU, 432 global) from shared
broad regex templates to topic-specific multi-word phrase regexes built
from each pattern's evidence keywords. Wire 214 patterns to 7 domain
keyword lists for stronger corroborative evidence matching. Fix 44 HR
keyword references to use consolidated industry-hr dictionary. Update
57 non-top500 patterns with domain keyword wiring and phrase embedding.

Key changes per pattern:
- Replace broad (?is)\b(generic|terms)\b regex with topic phrases
- Add keyword_lists references to domain-specific dictionaries
- Gate 65-confidence tier with evidence requirement to reduce FP
- Update operation field to reflect new detection approach

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
